title: xpehh extractor (response)
description: JSON response shape the popstats server returns for an XP-EHH compute. The dispatcher builds this from the TSV emitted by engines/xpehh.

request_id.description: Echoed from the activator if supplied.

n_focal_with_xpehh.description: Focals where both iHH_test and iHH_ref were finite and positive.

global_mean.description: Mean of raw XP-EHH across all focals with values; used for norm_xpehh.

engine_version.description: Optional engine git ref / version string.

approximation_note.default: Diploid-IBS-likelihood approximation of XP-EHH from unphased BEAGLE GLs. NOT Sabeti-strict; phasing recommended for reviewer-grade values.

n_focal.description: Focal SNPs whose position falls in this window.

n_focal_with_xpehh.description: Subset of n_focal where XP-EHH was finite.

iHH_test_mean.description: Mean iHH (∫ EHH dd) of the test cohort across in-window focals. null when n_focal_with_xpehh == 0.

norm_xpehh_mean.description: Mean z-scored XP-EHH (against global mean/sd from metadata).

sign_convention: positive XP-EHH = test cohort has longer extended haplotype homozygosity than ref cohort at the focal.
